response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the performer as Nanashi Mumei from the visual.
2. Detected on-screen text at 02:33: "Departure!", "Composition: 羽仁志", "Lyrics: 羽仁志".
3. Performed search: '"Departure!" 羽仁志 Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. The search results confirmed "Departure!" as the 'Hunter x Hunter (2011)' opening theme, with the composer actually being Haba Hitoshi (羽場仁志), clarifying the slight variation in the on-screen credit.
5. Extracted lyrics from reputable anime lyric sources and mapped to the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a virtual idol, Nanashi Mumei, performing the song 'Departure!' (the opening theme from 'Hunter x Hunter'). The video begins with a montage followed by her live performance on a virtual stage.

scenes.description: Nanashi Mumei performs 'Departure!' on a virtual stage. On-screen text credits '羽仁志' as the composer/lyricist.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
大地を踏みしめて 君は目覚めていく
天使の微笑みで 連れ出して!
孤独でも ここにいる
生まれた意味がある
優しさに満ち溢れてる
青い地球にありがとう
YOU CAN SMILE!
太陽を浴びて
YOU CAN FLY AWAY!
世界中が君を待っている
天使の微笑みで 連れ出して!
YOU CAN SMILE!
何度でも立ち上がれ!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Stepping firmly on the earth, you awaken,
take me away with an angel's smile.
Even if you're lonely, you're not alone
There must be a reason for being born
Thank you to the blue planet that's overflowing with kindness.
You can smile again.
Bask in the sun.
You can fly away.
The world is waiting for you to shine.
Lead us out with an angelic smile!
You can smile!
Stand up again and again!
